top3.sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name
FROM attendance a
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Student'
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH student_club_attendance AS (
    SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, COUNT(*) AS attendance_count
    FROM event e
    JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
    JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
    WHERE m.position = 'Student_Club'
    GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
)
SELECT event_name
FROM student_club_attendance
ORDER BY attendance_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name
FROM attendance a
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Student'
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH student_club_attendance AS (
    SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, COUNT(*) AS attendance_count
    FROM event e
    JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
    JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
    WHERE m.position = 'Student_Club'
    GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
)
SELECT event_name
FROM student_club_attendance
ORDER BY attendance_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH student_club_events AS (
    SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, COUNT(a.link_to_member) AS attendance_count
    FROM event e
    INNER JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
    INNER JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
    WHERE m.position = 'Student_Club'
    GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
)
SELECT event_name
FROM student_club_events
ORDER BY attendance_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
